title: Even Better Nether
description: A Remake of the Popular Nether Overhaul Mod, Better Nether; Modernized
body:
## WARNING:
**This mod is currently undergoing a major rewrite. 2.0+ versions of the mod will be Incompatible with existing worlds, but the update will fix a LOT of bugs and add some new content.**

![Even Better Nether banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48cead59cfef793764a1de957685b51f028451dd_0.webp)
## Description:

**Even Better Nether** is a "Soft-Remake" of the popular Nether-Overhaul Mod **Better Nether**; "Soft-Remake" meaning it keeps a lot of the major ideas and features, but is a total rewrite which overhauls, changes, and adds content, in this case bringing it up to a more Vanilla+ Standard.

## Why Did I Make EBN?

I created **Even Better Nether** for one main reason; **Better Nether** is just too cluttered. All the 3D Modeled Blocks, Differently Styled Textures, and Overshaped Objects break the style of the game, and that's not even touching on the fact that the mod just adds too much varying content. So, I wanted to simplify it!

I've kept many of the biomes (Or at least kept them as inspiration), and overhauled a few others, but in a more modern style. You'll still have these vibrant, lively, and unique biomes, but it has a modern modding touch to it!

## What's the differences between EBN and Better Nether?

At the moment, this mod is missing some bits of content from **Better Nether**, mainly a handful of Biomes, Mobs, and Structures, but a handful of the most iconic biomes, along with many tools and items you might find familiar. Regardless, it's more than enough content to spice up your Nether. Additionally, **Even Better Nether** replaces or adds entirely new content not seen in the original Better Nether, providing a completely unique experience.

Credits to the Original Mod for some of the base textures used (Although almost all textures are modified or original), as well as the concepts! [Better Nether's Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betternether)

### Incompatabilities:
- BClib
- Better Nether
- Better End

Even Better Nether MAY also be incompatible with other Worldgen mods or mods that modify the nether's biome map, this is due to Even Better Nether currently using the "vanilla" method of adding Nether Biomes. In the future I'm looking to move over to Terrablender, but in the meantime, here be dragons!
